column1: I hope it _____ raining soon. It _____ since morning. (stop, rain)
What's wrong? I can't hear a word he _____ . (say)
Can you see Oleg? He _____ at the front door. (stand)
Flamingoes _____ on one leg to keep warm. (stand)
From the east and south Kievan Rus _____ often _____ by the Khazars. (attack)
A lot of churches _____ in the 15th century. (build)
He _____ me the book yesterday but I _____ it yet. (give, not read)
Dmitry Donskoy _____ a victory over the Mongols. (win)
We can _____ the floor in the evening. (polish)
